error.403.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
error.429.too_many_requests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
error.429.rate_limit: Too many attempts. Try again in {retry_after_minutes} minutes.
error.400.verification_invalid_factor: This verification factor is not available
error.404.verification_challenge_not_fou: Verification challenge not found or expired
error.423.verification_locked: Too many failed attempts — verification locked
error.422.blocked: Account temporarily blocked. Try again in {retry_after_minutes} minutes.
error.400.code_expired: Verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
error.409.email_taken: This email is already registered to another account.
error.409.email_reserved: This email is reserved by another pending change request.
error.409.phone_taken: This phone number is already registered to another account.
error.409.phone_reserved: This phone number is reserved by another pending change request.
error.400.oauth_failed: Failed to authenticate with OAuth provider
error.400.not_available: This value is already registered or reserved.
error.400.no_current_value: No current value on this account.
error.400.email_or_phone_required: Either email or phone is required
error.400.email_or_phone_not_both: Provide either email or phone, not both
error.400.password_already_set: Password is already set. Use the change password flow.
error.400.no_password: No password is set. Use set password first.
error.400.no_verified_contact: No verified email or phone on this account.
error.400.invalid_method: Invalid or unavailable method for this account.
error.404.user_for_reset: No account found with this email or phone.
error.403.mock_otp_admin: OTP-based auth is disabled for admin accounts in mock mode.
error.404.qr_not_found: QR code not found or expired.
error.400.qr_fulfilled: QR code has already been used.
error.400.qr_type_required: QR type is required (session_share or login_request).
error.401.qr_auth_required: Authentication required to generate a session_share QR code.
error.409.qr_account_conflict: A different account is already signed in on this device.
error.403.qr_device_mismatch: This QR code belongs to another device.
error.403.qr_unauth_scan: This QR code cannot be scanned by an unauthenticated device.
error.400.totp_not_pending: No pending TOTP setup. Call /totp/setup/ first.
error.403.step_up_required: This action requires TOTP verification. Obtain a step-up token first.
error.423.account_locked: Account temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts. Try again in {retry_after_minutes} minutes.
error.400.invalid_redirect_url: redirect_url must be a relative path starting with /  — absolute URLs are not allowed.
error.400.magic_link_invalid: Magic link is invalid or has expired.
error.429.magic_link_rate: Too many magic link requests. Please try again later.
error.400.passkey_challenge_expired: Passkey challenge has expired. Please try again.
error.400.last_auth_method: Cannot remove the last authentication method.
error.400.sso_not_configured: SSO is not configured for this organization.
error.400.sso_invalid_response: Invalid SSO response from identity provider.
error.403.sso_required: This account must sign in via SSO. Use your organization SSO link.
error.409.sso_org_slug_taken: An organization with this slug already exists.
error.400.captcha_invalid: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
error.400.amount_invalid: Amount must be a positive integer
error.403.forbidden_billing: Forbidden: cannot manage this billing account
error.409.gdpr.export_cooldown: A data export was already requested in the last 30 days.
error.409.gdpr.closure_already_pending: Account closure is already in progress.
error.409.gdpr.legal_hold: Account data is under a legal hold and cannot be deleted.
error.400.invalid_platform: Platform must be one of: ios, android, web.
error.400.display_name_too_short: Display name must be at least 2 characters
error.400.invalid_avatar_format: Invalid avatar reference format. Expected: avatar/<hash>
error.404.member_not_found: Member not found in this workspace
error.403.forbidden_workspace: You do not have access to this workspace
error.403.last_owner_cannot_be_removed: The last owner cannot be removed; transfer ownership first
error.400.already_workspace_member: User is already a member of this workspace
notification.otp_code.subject: Your {company_name} verification code: {code}
notification.otp_code.heading: Your verification code
notification.otp_code.body: Use the code below to verify your identity:
notification.otp_code.warning: Don't share this code with anyone. If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
notification.auth_change_requested.body: Your {change_type} change has been requested. New {change_type}: {masked_new_value}. Change will complete on: {scheduled_date}.
notification.auth_change_requested.warni: If you did not request this change, please contact support immediately.
notification.auth_change_requested.sms: {company_name}: Your {change_type} change has been requested. Completes {scheduled_date}. Contact support if unexpected.
notification.auth_change_reminder.body: Your {change_type} will be changed to {masked_new_value} in {days_remaining} days.
notification.auth_change_reminder.warnin: If you did not request this, please contact support.
notification.auth_change_reminder.sms: {company_name}: Your {change_type} changes in {days_remaining} days to {masked_new_value}. Contact support if unexpected.
notification.auth_change_urgent.subject: URGENT: {change_type} change tomorrow
notification.auth_change_urgent.heading: Change tomorrow
notification.auth_change_urgent.body: Your {change_type} will be changed TOMORROW ({scheduled_date}). This is your last chance to cancel.
notification.auth_change_urgent.warning: After this change, you will need the new {change_type} to log in.
notification.auth_change_urgent.sms: URGENT: {company_name} {change_type} changes tomorrow ({scheduled_date}). Last chance to cancel!
notification.auth_change_urgent.push_bod: Last chance to cancel your {change_type} change.
notification.auth_change_completed.body: Your account {change_type} has been successfully changed.
notification.auth_change_completed.warni: If you did not authorize this change, contact support immediately.
notification.auth_change_completed.sms: {company_name}: Your {change_type} has been changed. Contact support if unexpected.
notification.gdpr.export_ready.subject: Your data export is ready
notification.gdpr.export_ready.heading: Your data export is ready
notification.gdpr.export_ready.body: The copy of your personal data you requested is ready to download. The download link is valid for a limited time.
notification.gdpr.export_ready.warning: If you did not request this export, please contact support immediately.
notification.gdpr.inactivity_warning.sub: Your account will be closed in {days_remaining} days
notification.gdpr.inactivity_warning.bod: Your account has been inactive for a long time. It will be closed and your data deleted in {days_remaining} days unless you sign in again.
notification.gdpr.inactivity_warning.war: Signing in once is enough to keep your account active.
notification.gdpr.inactivity_closed.head: Your account has been closed
notification.gdpr.inactivity_closed.body: Your account was closed due to prolonged inactivity and your personal data has been deleted, as required by our data retention policy.
notification.gdpr.inactivity_closed.warn: If you believe this was a mistake, please contact our support team.
notification.workspace.invitation.body: {inviter_name} invited you to join the workspace “{workspace_name}”.
notification.new_message.subject: New message from {sender_name}
notification.new_message.heading: New message from {sender_name}
notification.new_message.body: You have a new message about “{listing_title}”.
notification.report_reviewed.subject: Your report has been reviewed
notification.report_reviewed.heading: Your report has been reviewed
notification.report_reviewed.body: You reported a listing. After checking it, we have taken action.
notification.report_reviewed.push_body: Your report has been reviewed and action was taken.
notification.listing_expiring.subject: Your listing will expire soon
notification.listing_expiring.heading: Your listing is expiring
notification.listing_expiring.body: Your listing “{listing_title}” will be unpublished in {days_remaining} days. You can turn on auto-republish to keep it active.
notification.listing_blocked.subject: Your listing has been blocked
notification.listing_blocked.heading: Your listing has been blocked
notification.listing_blocked.body: Your listing “{listing_title}” has been blocked for violating {company_name} guidelines.
notification.listing_blocked.warning: If you believe this was a mistake, please contact our support team.
notification.magic_link_login.subject: Your {company_name} sign-in link
notification.magic_link_login.heading: Sign in to {company_name}
notification.magic_link_login.body: Click the button below to sign in. This link expires in 15 minutes and can only be used once.
notification.magic_link_login.warning: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
notification.new_device_login.subject: New sign-in to your account
notification.new_device_login.heading: New sign-in detected
notification.new_device_login.warning: If this was you, no action is needed. If you don't recognise this sign-in, secure your account immediately.
notification.suspicious_login.subject: Suspicious sign-in detected
notification.suspicious_login.heading: Suspicious sign-in detected
notification.suspicious_login.cta: This wasn't me — revoke all sessions
notification.suspicious_login.warning: If this was you, no action is needed. If not, click the button above immediately to revoke all sessions.
notification.all_sessions_revoked.body: All active sessions on your account have been revoked. You have been signed out of all devices.
notification.all_sessions_revoked.warnin: If you did not initiate this action, please reset your password immediately.
notification.footer.consent: You received this email because you agreed to receive messages from {company_name}.
